prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年该科类最低位次依次约 56409→55444→55813→27995→31136。2024 年陕西高考改革（文理分科→3+1+2），位次体系发生结构性变化，2024 年物理类基准约 27995 名，2025 年小幅后移至 31136 名，近两年整体呈后移趋势，2025 年基准约 31136 名；该校在陕西物理类招生计划：2021 年 213 人、2022 年 216 人、2023 年 196 人、2024 年 206 人、2025 年 216 人；2026 年计划 236 人，较 2025 年扩招约 9.3%，计划增加意味着竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名持续上升：2021 年第 144 名→2022 年第 130 名→2023 年第 118 名→2024 年第 104 名→2025 年第 93 名→2026 年第 87 名，排名稳步提升反映学校综合实力与认可度增强；2023 年高考周期内曾因教师师德师风事件出现偏负面舆情；2024 年转为中性/混合（分数线争议）；2026 年声誉数据中未单独出现明显负面信号。抖音热度排名第 32（较热），综合热度约 136.5 万，短视频平台关注度处于中上水平，对报考热度有一定正向作用。未见明显投档断档记录；海南大学在第五轮学科评估中未出现 A- 及以上等级学科，优势学科以农林、海洋、法学等为主，与物理类招生的计算机、电子信息、自动化等工科专业关联度一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信 、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与该校物理类热门招生专业方向吻合，有利于吸引高分考生。陕西省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年（172468 人）增长约 19.7%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。；海南大学位于海南省海口市，距陕西较远，跨省就读的地域偏好对陕西考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在陕西招生计划占 比较小（约 200 余人），属跨省招生常态。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 31136 名、2026 年扩招约 9.3%（竞争加剧）、陕西省物理类考生大幅增长约 19.7%（竞争显著加剧）、学校软科排名持续上升（吸引力增强）、抖音热度较高等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低录取位次较 2025 年进一步后移。预测最低位次约 33066 名，区间 32566–33566 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 56409→55444→55813→27995→31136. In 2024, Shaanxi's college entrance examination reform (from arts/science division to 3+1+2) caused structural changes in the ranking system. The 2024 physics category baseline was about 27995, shifting slightly backward to 31136 in 2025, showing a backward trend over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 31136. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for physics category: 213 in 2021, 216 in 2022, 196 in 2023, 206 in 2024, 216 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 236, an increase of about 9.3% compared to 2025, meaning slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has been steadily rising: 144th in 2021→130th in 2022→118th in 2023→104th in 2024→93rd in 2025→87th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was a negative public opinion incident regarding teacher ethics; in 2024, it turned neutral/mixed (score line controversy); in 2026 reputation data, no obvious negative signals appeared alone. Douyin popularity ranking 32nd (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 1.365 million, short video platform attention is at an upper-middle level, having a certain positive effect on application enthusiasm. No obvious record of admission cut-off gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University did not have any A- or above disciplines, with advantageous disciplines mainly in agriculture, forestry, oceanography, law, etc., having average relevance to physics category enrollment majors like computer science, electronic information, automation, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's popular physics category enrollment directions, helping attract high-scoring students. In 2026, Shaanxi province's physics category examinees are about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 2025 (172,468), significantly intensifying competition. Hainan University is located in Haikou, Hainan Province, far from Shaanxi; the regional preference for cross-province study has a certain inhibitory effect on Shaanxi examinees' willingness to apply. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi accounts for a small proportion (about 200+), which is normal for cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 31136, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 9.3% (intensified competition), the significant increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi physics category examinees (significantly intensified competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (increased attractiveness), and relatively high Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for physics category in 2026 will further shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 33066, with a range of 32566–33566.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 33066, range 32566–33566. It is recommended that examinees within the range use Tier 2 majors as main choices, Tier 1 popular engineering majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. Those with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (i.e., less than 32566) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. Those with rankings near the lower limit (around 33566) should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this category were approximately 3325→4444→7870→5751→4844. After the 2024 Shaanxi college entrance examination reform, the ranking system changed. In 2023, the liberal arts ranking significantly dropped to 7870, rebounded to 5751 in 2024, and further advanced to 4844 in 2025 for the history category, showing a forward trend in the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 4844th place. The university's enrollment plan for the history category in Shaanxi: 35 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 52 in 2024, 40 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 45, an increase of about 12.5% compared to 2025, making competition slightly more intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, reflecting the university's enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident regarding teacher ethics; in 2024, it turned neutral/mixed; in 2026, no significant negative signals appeared separately in reputation data. Douyin popularity ranking is 32nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.365 million, indicating mid-to-high attention on short video platforms. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University did not have any disciplines rated A- or above, with advantageous disciplines mainly in law, agriculture, forestry, and oceanography, which are somewhat related to the history category's enrollment majors such as law, Chinese language and literature, and accounting.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a social popularity rating of recommended (relatively hot), Chinese language and literature is recommended, accounting is recommended, business administration is clearly discouraged, and tourism management, as part of the business administration category, has lower popularity. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17% compared to 2025 (75,641), significantly increasing competition. Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, far from Shaanxi, and the regional preference for cross-province study somewhat suppresses Shaanxi candidates' willingness to apply. The university's enrollment plan for the history category in Shaanxi is about 40–50, which is normal for cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4844, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 12.5% (increased competition), the 17% increase in Shaanxi history category candidates (increased competition), and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (increased attractiveness), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the history category in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5237, with a range of 4737–5737.
